description_long: This shotgun features a compact, boxy design with a predominantly teal-blue metal body accented by black components. The receiver is robust and angular, with a visible magazine well and a curved magazine extending below. The grip is textured and ergonomic, made from black polymer or metal, and the trigger guard is squared and substantial. The barrel is short and thick, with a large bore and a simple muzzle, lacking any visible ribbing or venting. Subtle surface wear and scratches suggest heavy use, and a stylized emblem is visible on one side of the receiver.
description: A compact, teal-blue shotgun with a boxy metal body, black grip, and a curved magazine. The design is robust, with a short barrel and squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the teal-blue body, black grip, curved magazine, and a stylized emblem on the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large, round barrel opening and the squared, blocky profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, grip, and the plain receiver without the emblem.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the grip, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, large, and robust with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
